column5: Description

Admin verification gate (Completed → Verified). Locks fees quantities and proof documents

Mark job as Completed with remark and adjusted fees. Create follow-up job for retry
Auto-logged history of all status changes uploads cancellations and replacements
Flat table of all jobs across shipments. Filter by status service vendor. Group by vendor/service/date
Locations/warehouses/terminals with address and district mapping
China administrative regions (province → city → district) for rate lookup
L1/L2 service hierarchy (FM EC CS CR OH → sub-services with cost IDs)
Customer list with code name active/inactive
Vendor list with code name service capabilities active/inactive
Truck type master data (1.5T 3T 5T 8T 10T 12T 40HQ 45HQ) with capacity specs
Admin can CRUD vehicle data across all vendors

Driver updates status to Started Pickup with confirmation dialogue
Barcode scanning of handling units at pickup. Green/red feedback beep sound. Manual key-in fallback
Review scanned vs expected HU count. Copy missing HU numbers to clipboard
Camera capture or gallery upload. Max 5 images JPEG/PNG compressed under 1MB
Driver updates status to Started Drop Off
Camera/gallery proof upload. Completes trip on submission
Hub Ops selects active hub. Multi-hub users can switch between assigned hubs
Scan HU barcodes to update ARR status. Select trip then scan. Manual key-in fallback
